summary: M439 — Battle status icons lifted above HP bar. Loot list shown one item per line with rarity colors (was comma-joined). World map rebuilt as a strict FTL-style staggered grid: every non-prologue zone now has 5-7 interior columns × 3 rows with a column-parity offset; every node is filled (filler 'Wandering Foes' combat encounters added where the authored zone was short); edges only go column c → c+1 (no backwards travel); per-column edge crossings prevented by a sign-test; total in+out connections capped at 4; dungeons + hidden bosses remain as single-edge off-shoots above/below the main band. Verified across all 12 act zones: zero >4-degree nodes, zero backwards edges, zero broken exits, zero node-position duplicates.
